^36+4420*G*x^35-10722*G*x^34+21676*G*x^33-38040*G*x^32+60834*G*x^31-93522*G*x^30+141752*G*x^29-206232*G*x^28+272766*G*x^27-312550*G*x^26+299964*G*x^25-235024*G*x^24+146682*G*x^23-70824*G*x^22+25412*G*x^21-6362*G*x^20+990*G*x^19-72*G*x^18+x^38-14*x^37+91*x^36-366*x^35+1029*x^34-2192*x^33+3844*x^32-6175*x^31+9997*x^30-16302*x^29+24596*x^28-31681*x^27+33267*x^26-27756*x^25+18032*x^24-8905*x^23+3226*x^22-808*x^21+125*x^20-9*x^19)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
